shad_rasa.excess: Obesity, diabetes, Kapha disorders, dental caries, tumours
Thirst, bleeding disorders, burning, oedema, skin diseases, tooth sensitivity
Hypertension, skin diseases, wrinkling, baldness, thirst, inflammation
Impotence, fainting, thirst, burning, depletion of dhatus
Cachexia, Vata aggravation, dizziness, dry skin, loss of libido
Obstruction, constipation, gas, Vata disorders, dehydration, reduced libido

pathya_apathya.title: Ahara Vidhi Vishesha Ayatana
pathya_apathya.subtitle: Ideal food intake guidelines
items: Eat only when genuinely hungry
Eat warm food — activates Agni
Eat oily/unctuous food — lubrication
Eat in right quantity — neither excess nor deficiency
Eat only after previous meal is digested
Eat foods that are not contradictory to each other
Eat in a comfortable place with proper utensils
Do not eat too fast or too slow
Give full attention to food — no reading/screens
Eat food that agrees with your constitution

pathya_apathya.title: Viruddha Ahara
pathya_apathya.subtitle: Incompatible food combinations to avoid
items: Fish + milk — incompatible (different properties)
Honey + ghee in equal quantities — toxic combination
Honey heated above 40°C — Ama producing
Fruit + milk — incompatible fermentation
Cold water after oily food — congeals fats
Radish + milk — opposite Virya
Prawns/shrimp + milk — incompatible
Sour foods + milk — curdling in stomach
Ice cream after hot meals — Agni suppression
Fruit juice + grains — enzyme competition

ritucharya.ahara: Bitter, pungent, astringent foods; barley, honey, dry foods
ritucharya.avoid: Heavy, oily, sweet, sour, cold foods

ritucharya.ahara: Sweet, cold, light foods; coconut, ghee, milk, cooling herbs
ritucharya.avoid: Spicy, sour, salty, heavy, excessive sun exposure

ritucharya.ahara: Warm cooked foods; light soups, honey, old rice, lentils
ritucharya.avoid: Raw foods, river water, excessive vegetables, fasting

ritucharya.ahara: Sweet, bitter, astringent; pomegranate, ghee, gooseberry, rice
ritucharya.avoid: Excess oil, sour, salty, day sleep, eastern wind

ritucharya.ahara: Heavy, oily, sweet, sour, salty foods; meat, dairy, wheat, sesame
Same as Hemanta; emphasise warming, nourishing, building foods
ritucharya.avoid: Cold, light, astringent foods; excessive exercise
